evals.name: slow-suite-strategy
evals.prompt: Our web app test suite takes 45 minutes and developers avoid running it locally. Give me a test architecture strategy.
evals.expected_output: Inventories suite layers, classifies slow feedback, proposes target shape, chooses first migration slice, and uses metrics rather than generic pyramid advice.

evals.name: mock-heavy-suite
evals.prompt: We have lots of unit tests with mocks but still ship integration bugs. What testing architecture should we move toward?
evals.expected_output: Identifies missing boundary coverage, distinguishes core from adapters, warns against mock-only confidence, and suggests integration/contract tests.
